false_form: Conjecture 16 of arXiv:2603.29571 was jointly proposed by Bandeira and Dmitriev.
name: LUCCA_ATTRIBUTION
true_form: Conjecture 16 was proposed by Lucca; Bandeira and Dmitriev are EDITORS of arXiv:2603.29571, not joint proposers. Authorship-vs-proposership distinction matters for citation hygiene.
